nodes.label: AI as character development enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me to really give my characters so much more depth than what I was previously able to

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: It is faster for me to have the AI do the backstory than for me to come up with all of the details on my own if I am under time constraints

nodes.label: AI as threat to creative workforce
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool preserving human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that the younger kids will lose their imaginations because 'AI can do it all for them'

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as assistant that does not replace human writers
nodes.grounding_span: I'm so concerned that publishers will turn to AI as a cheap way to mass produce stories that are not actually written by real people

nodes.label: Creative depth and character richness
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that they can picture every last detail of the character that they are reading about

nodes.label: Human authenticity and soul in storytelling
nodes.grounding_span: that special little something is missing if it doesn't come from a beating heart

nodes.label: Preservation of imagination and humanity
nodes.grounding_span: We NEED that in order to survive and to keep hope and peace in the world

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI's role in character depth
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me to really give my characters so much more depth

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing human writers
nodes.grounding_span: I'm so concerned that publishers will turn to AI as a cheap way to mass produce stories

nodes.label: Fear of loss of imagination in children
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that the younger kids will lose their imaginations

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I sadly see it taking over more than it should

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation — uses AI only for specific, bounded tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I never use it to write the story. I love the personal creativity of writing but when the clock is ticking down I do like to use it as a helper

nodes.label: Human-centric creative control — maintains direction and final say
nodes.grounding_span: I was definitely driving the conversation. I had an idea of what I wanted it to look like
